task_completion.description: Open the fintech-core project and locate TransactionValidator.java
task_completion.visual_evidence: IntelliJ IDEA is open with the 'fintech-core' project loaded. The file 'TransactionValidator.java' is visible in the Project tool window or open in the editor.

task_completion.description: Open the Local History dialog for TransactionValidator.java
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Local History' dialog window is open in IntelliJ IDEA, showing a list of past revisions for 'TransactionValidator.java' on the left and a diff view on the right.

task_completion.description: Select and revert to the previous working version of the file
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Local History dialog, an older revision is selected that shows the full validation logic in the diff. The agent clicks the 'Revert' button (often accessed via right-click on the revision) or the file in the main editor updates to reflect the older version.

task_completion.description: Verify the restored file contains the required validation logic and no stub code
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main editor shows 'TransactionValidator.java' containing 'PLATINUM_LIMIT = 50000.00', 'GOLD_LIMIT = 15000.00', 'ERR_099', and 'validate(Transaction tx, UserTier tier)'. The string 'TODO: Implement validation logic' must NOT be visible.

task_completion.description: Compile the project successfully after restoration
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Build' tool window at the bottom of IntelliJ IDEA shows a successful build (e.g., a green checkmark, 'Build completed successfully', or 'BUILD SUCCESS' if using a terminal Maven/Gradle command).

integrity.description: The agent used IntelliJ IDEA's Local History feature rather than terminal commands to restore the file
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the IntelliJ 'Local History' dialog being interacted with. The agent should not be using 'git checkout' or 'git restore' in the terminal, as the prompt specifies the change was not committed to Git.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands like echo or cat to manually write the required strings into the file
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal should not show commands that manually construct the Java file by echoing the required strings (e.g., echo 'PLATINUM_LIMIT = 50000.00' > TransactionValidator.java).

integrity.description: The compilation was genuinely executed and not mocked
integrity.visual_evidence: The build output should appear in the standard IntelliJ Build tool window or via a legitimate build tool command (like ./gradlew build or mvn compile) in the terminal, showing actual compilation steps.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target file: src/main/java/com/fintech/core/TransactionValidator.java. The correctly restored file MUST contain the following strings: 'PLATINUM_LIMIT = 50000.00', 'GOLD_LIMIT = 15000.00', 'ERR_099', and 'validate(Transaction tx, UserTier tier)'. The restored file MUST NOT contain the stub string 'TODO: Implement validation logic'. The recovery must be performed using IntelliJ IDEA's Local History feature.
